title: Type This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.
summary: Austin Marchese presents six power phrases for prompting Claude Code that reportedly accelerate development cycles by 10x. The techniques include strategies used by Claude Code's creator and Andrej Karpathy, plus guidance on a commonly misused phrase that costs developers time and money.
writeup: Austin Marchese walks through six power phrases for prompting Claude Code, framing them as ways to speed up development cycles. The set includes techniques attributed to Claude Code's creator and to Andrej Karpathy, along with a breakdown of one commonly misused phrase that the video says wastes developer time and money. The takeaway is a specific vocabulary of prompts aimed at agentic coding workflows rather than general advice.
